column8: USSR-led political and strategic bloc centered on Eastern Europe.
column9: Use when the source explicitly treats the USSR and Eastern European states as an integrated political bloc, Eastern bloc, Soviet bloc, or 東側陣営.
column10: Do not use for Eastern Europe as geography. Do not automatically include the PRC. Use EASTERN_EUROPE in region_ids for geographic references.
column11: 東側陣営;東欧圏;ソ連圏;ソ連ブロック;Eastern bloc;Soviet bloc

column15: PRC is normally outside this bloc ID unless the historical source itself groups it together.

column6: Cold War era
column8: US-led Western political, strategic, and diplomatic camp.
column9: Use when the source explicitly says 西側諸国, 西側陣営, 自由主義陣営, or treats Western states as a collective political actor.

column15: NATO is an organization and should remain in organization_ids; WESTERN_BLOC expresses the broader camp.
